text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whoosh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Following a thorough discussion, Manhattan Cafe
and I officially decide to go to France so she can
compete in an international G1 race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day we're scheduled to fly, and we're at
the airport. Manhattan Cafe, Agnes Tachyon, and
I are leaving Japan together in pursuit of new
challenges.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Trainer, Tachyon... Let's go...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
To catch up to my friend, who's there on the
other side of the skies...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Now now, hold on a minute.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon stops dead in her tracks,
shrugging her shoulders.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Let's review our international agenda one last
time. Perhaps we've overlooked one or two
factors. All right...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can tell from her tone that she's up to
something.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You are Manhattan Cafe, an Umamusume. Your
talents need no introduction.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: You're very much capable of breaching new frontiers. However... your toenails are by no means strong.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Competing domestically is well within your
capabilities. But you're not suited to international
tracks that demand strength.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You'll also have long travel times and
environmental adjustments to contend with. We
can't rule out the possibility of these factors
triggering sudden fluctuations in your weight.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Those are all of the factors I can think of. Now,
with that said...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Tachyon, what are you trying to say...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: We've come too far to stop now... I won't...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Zip those lips. I don't believe I said that I was debating with you, did I?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Trainer, let's have a talk, shall we? Before you take to the French turf and have your fun.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
If you truly want to take on an international G1
race, I'll accompany you. I mean, maybe if you
pull out all the stops, things'll go in your favor.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Similarly, even if you do fail, to me it'll just be
another experiment coming to an end. Nothing to
fret over.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: But I wonder, what does failure mean to you? To you both? Once you go on this trip, there'll be no turning back the clock.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
If Cafe were to fail, her racing career would end.
With that in mind, is it still worth taking this trip?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Personal feelings aside, what do you think as a
trainer? I've yet to hear that side of the equation.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
This... is simply a final reminder. An... unbiased
record.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite her tone, I sense from the look in Agnes
Tachyon's eyes that she's wavering a little.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Go on. What is your... top priority?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Every experiment requires a clear purpose. I'll
provide the litmus paper in this case.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: What do you want?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You don't have to tell me. But for the sake of
both your futures...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: You need to know what you're prioritizing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I feel as if... she's dropped me a lifeline covered in
thorns.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My top priority... That would be the promise I
made with Manhattan Cafe...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We'll catch up to your friend, and we'll overtake
her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But if we don't stop now, we'll end up as martyrs
for that dream...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even if our dream doesn't come true, I'll be happy
as long as I can see it through to the end with
her... But...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Thank you... so much...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
If you don't mind helping me whenever something
happens, we could figure things out somehow,
and maybe...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...Right now, in front of you, there's a box of
chocolates.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...It's there. Really. A box of chocolates I made
myself...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
You have to tell the truth... I tried really hard with
these...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Did we come this far just for the sake of seeing
things through to the end?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
What if, in chasing her dream, Manhattan Cafe
ends up losing everything else?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If that could happen... Should I still go abroad
with her?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: What is your... top priority?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Trainer?
choice_data_list:
Your success and your future are more
important than our dream.

Your success and your future are more
important than our dream.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hearing the words out loud makes their truth all
the more obvious.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The first dream we had changed into something
else. Somewhere down the line, it got warped a
little.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Given the crossroad we're at, I can't pretend that
dream doesn't matter.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And although it means giving up, I know it's the
right decision to make as her trainer.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Oh... Well, then...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: This is farewell.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
We have to part ways. I thought... you were
different from everyone else. You promised we
would overtake her, together.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: But... I misunderstood. I got... complacent.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: It's... all right. From now on... I'll go alone...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I'll... be fine... Things will just go back to the way
they were...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I'll overtake my friend, no matter what. So...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Goodbye.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Blood seeps from Manhattan Cafe's toenails, and
when she raises her hand, I see blood under her
fingernails, too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I consider stepping in and stopping her from
going. But as I watch Manhattan Cafe walk
away...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I can't move... My legs... won't budge...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Why? I have to go... I have to.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: If I don't, my friend will...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: My friend will... disappear...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: So I have to!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: WUHHHHH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The voice rattles my skull. It belongs to
Manhattan Cafe's friend, who means more to her
than anything. It sounds like her friend is in her
death throes, and yet...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe doesn't move an inch. It's as if
her soul has left her body...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I suppose... there's nothing I can do.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I guess... that's it. With you and Tachyon... It's two
against one.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: But... what am I... what am I supposed to do now...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... Ughhh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I go over to Manhattan Cafe, and Agnes Tachyon
follows. And that's how...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At the last minute, we cancel Manhattan Cafe's
international plans. Setting our sights on
domestic tracks again, we prepare for the
Takarazuka Kinen.
